_comment: mRNA Therapeutics contact screen (playbook §3.2 / §5 / §6 / §7). Deterministic title check + company-verdict inheritance. APPROVED terms override EXCLUSION terms (so 'Strategic Sourcing', 'Drug Product', 'Technology Transfer' survive a 'Strategy'/'Product'/'Technology' exclusion). role_segment is a hint, NOT truth: a null segment is unsegmented, not out-of-scope, so titles are always re-checked. LinkedIn verification (§5.2) and CRM 6-month suppression (§5.3) require data not in staging — DEFERRED and FLAGGED, never silently passed. A contact's best status without that data is 'eligible', which the delivery contract forbids from crossing.

defer_flags.linkedin_verification: playbook §5.2 — verify current employer + title when a profile exists; linkedin_verified true/false/null. Data not in staging; flag, do not pass.
defer_flags.crm_6mo_suppression: playbook §5.3 HARD RULE — suppress any contact/account with logged activity in trailing 180 days. Data not in staging; flag, do not pass.
